vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological failure. There is no evidence of life in any of the four registered pots. The environment is effectively a sterile substrate setup.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the registered flora. The 'White Rabbit' anchor is the only non-soil object present.
vision_report.narrative_description: Upon meticulous audit of the provided image sequence, I have determined that the biome is currently devoid of all registered plant life. The pots (P1-P4) contain only substrate and mineral components. There is no evidence of the String of Nickels, Mexican Mint, Pothos, or Silver Guest. The environment is stable but biologically inactive. The 'White Rabbit' anchor in P3 remains the only consistent landmark in an otherwise empty set of containers.
